title: hypochaeris microphylla
intro: Hypochaeris microphylla, also known as dwarf dandelion or small dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hypochaeris microphylla are thought to include the reduction of inflammation, improvement of digestion, and support of the immune system. Hypochaeris microphylla can be prepared as a tea or infusion, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its potential medicinal benefits.
